title: As Trump Scraps With Meloni, His Envoy to Italy Is at Sea
summary_full: Tilman J. Fertitta, the U.S. ambassador to Rome, is summering on his superyacht as President Trump squabbles with Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni of Italy.
